title: Charms Mod
description: Adds charms that give potion effects when in your inventory
body:
This mod adds special __Charms__ with buffs to Minecraft.



Charms: Swiftness Charm, Night Vision Charm, Regeneration Charm, Jump Boost Charm, Saturation Charm and a __Boss Charm__ that you can get by defeating the new added boss mob!

Mobs:



__Illager Warrior__ - Randomly spawns around the world, drops Charm with no effects when killed. You can use this No Effect Charm to craft Charms with actual buffs.

__Charmed Boss__ - Will summon in a random place nearby you by using the Charmed Boss Summoner and will drop the __Boss Charm__ when killed!

Mod for Minecraft 1.16.5 Forge.
